plugins.name: SongCounter
plugins.author: NeptuneHub
plugins.description: Counts analyzed songs as a bar chart, and uses the on_song_analyzed worker hook to show a per-run count of songs analyzed plus the full hook payload of the last analyzed song.

plugins.name: Lumae Analysis
plugins.author: Lumae
plugins.description: Companion plugin for the Lumae music app, providing server-side features and AudioMuse-AI integration.

plugins.name: SpectrumAnalyzer
plugins.author: T.N.Nguyen
plugins.description: Spectrum analysis and fake-lossless detection with per-song spectrograms.
